dct_title_s: The Holy Land at successive periods : on the same scale
dct_description_sm: Trely. W. Saunders, geogr. ; Stanford's Geographical Estabt.
Coordinates approximate and based on Greenwich meridian.
Bar scale on map given in "English statute miles".
Shows topography, drainage, boundaries, places of historical interest.
At head of map: Dr. William Smith's Ancient atlas. 34.
Shows topography, drainage, territorial boundaries of the tribes of Israel, places of historical interest.
Appears in Atlas of ancient geography, biblical and classical ... / edited by William Smith and George Grove. London : J. Murray, 1874.

[1] No. 1. The Holy Land before the conquest, 1451 B.C. -- [2] No. 2. The Holy Land after the conquest as divided amongst the twelve tribes -- [3] No. 3. The Holy Land during the monarchy, 1095 B.C. to 586 B.C. -- [4] No. 4. The Holy Land under the Maccabees, 100 B.C. -- [5] No. 5. The Holy Land under Herod the Great, B.C. 40 -- [6] No. 6. The Holy Land in the time of Our Lord -- [7] No. 7. The Holy Land under Agrippa I., A.D. 41 -- [8] No. 8. The Holy Land at the destruction of Jerusalem, A.D. 70.
